title: fix(text): load dotenv before server module imports
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Reading the instructions first
gist.blurb: Fixed a sneaky bug where our text models were trying to start before reading their environment variables. Everything is loading in the right order now, meaning smoother chatting and fewer hiccups.
gist.summary: Resolved an initialization issue in the text generation service by ensuring environment variables are loaded before server modules are imported.
gist.impact: Users will experience significantly improved reliability and fewer errors when making text generation requests.
gist.visual_concept: Metaphor for loading config before starting: Polly the bee handing the 'instructions' (env vars) to the server robot before it boots up.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) floppy disk labeled 'ENV' to a chunky monitor-head robot. The robot is patiently waiting to press a big start button on a retro server console. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
